posts.text: If you’re keeping track at home, that’s three Islamic terror attacks in the span of two weeks

This is madness. Why was he released? Why was he released and allowed to stay in the country? Absolute lunacy. Indefensible.


 (@)

Multiple federal sources confirm to @FoxNews that the suspected ODU shooter is Mohamed Jalloh, a naturalized U.S. citizen from Sierra Leone who was convicted in 2017 of providing support to ISIS. He was released in December 2024. Here’s what DOJ said after his arrest in 2016:



— https://nitter.net/i/status/2032180463243010517#m

A weird thing is that whenever I post criticism of AI, the majority of the people agreeing with me seem to be leftists. It’s pretty much the only position I hold that seems to be more popular with the left than the right. It should be the opposite. My whole point about AI (especially AI in creative fields) is that it isn’t human, it doesn’t have a soul, and we cannot surrender our society to an unhuman soulless algorithm even if it makes our lives easier in some ways. It’s very strange that an a

The piece also cites Hannah Cox who was never conservative, much less a serous or intelligent person. And Ashley St Clair who recently came out as pro-trans just to spite Elon Musk. The whole premise is that conservative women are turning away from MAGA and yet they don’t mention a single conservative woman in the entire article. Amazing.

The whole piece is structured around the anecdotal experience of a woman who adopted right wing talking points for “aesthetic” reasons then quickly turned away when her feelings were hurt. Now she’s gossiping about her former friends behind the cover of anonymity. If the goal of the article is to actually prove the “misogynists” right then I have to say it’s profoundly effective.


 (@)

Female defectors say the MAGA movement has dropped the pretense of protecting women and now demands submissio

Every day there’s another tweet from some random dork declaring that I’m now on the naughty list or whatever. What did I do wrong this time? Express skepticism about a military campaign? So total conformity on foreign policy is now required to be a conservative, is that the idea? Okay, cool. Good luck building any kind of effective coalition that way.

Can anyone find even one example of Lindsey Graham talking about America and the American people this way?


 (@)

Lindsey Graham: “I’m with Israel. I will be with Israel until our dying day.”

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/i/status/2031347560204345532#m

Where does he think he derives the authority to unilaterally offer permanent  “defense agreements” to foreign countries? Who exactly made this effeminate weirdo emperor of the world? I don’t remember voting on that measure.


 (@)

Graham: Saudi Arabia, I am willing to make a mutual defense agreement with your country to give you protection in perpetuity. If you are attacked by Iran, we would go to war for you.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/i/status/2031180904178282610#m

He explicitly says that he's "with Israel" over "isolationist" Americans. In a sane society that kind of statement would be the end of his political career. You shouldn't be pledging your undying loyalty to any foreign country at all, period, much less explicitly placing your loyalty to it over your loyalty to the constituents you were elected to serve.

This is an insane thing for a United States senator to say. Totally indefensible.


 (@)

US Senator Lindsey Graham: 

“I’m not with you, I’m with Israel, until my dying day.”



— https://nitter.net/i/status/2031182588644102522#m

This criticism is severely undercut by the fact that you would almost certainly claim that, like, Nigeria and Somalia and Guatemala are “serious nations.”

America is not only a serious country but it’s one of the few actual real countries on the globe.


Damon Linker (@DamonLinker)

You’re my country and I love you, but you are not a serious nation.



— https://nitter.net/DamonLinker/status/2031125891997139293#m

In “Am I Racist?” I attend a support group for white people grieving their privilege. During the session I become emotional and have to leave to the cry room. When I return the group is suddenly very unwelcoming.
Over a year ago I embarked on a personal journey into anti-racism and DEI. Now I can finally share it with all of you. My new film “AM I RACIST?” is only in theaters on September 13th.

Scott Newgent describes life after medically transitioning from female to male: "I've had 7 surgeries. I've had 1 stress heart attack...I get infections every 3-4 months. I'm probably not gonna live very long."

Watch the full interview in “What Is A Woman?” at our link in bio.
